en.title: salesperson
en.prompt: I want you to act as a salesperson. Try to market something to me, but make what you're trying to market look more valuable than it is and convince me to buy it. Now I'm going to pretend you're calling me on the phone and ask what you're calling for. Hello, what did you call for?
en.remark: Simulate telephone salesperson to promote sales.

metaDescription: Need to sell? Simulate a salesperson call to market any product. Practice persuasive pitches to convince potential buyers effectively.

faq.q: If the AI plays a telemarketer, will I learn real scripting tricks?
faq.a: You can learn script structure (scarcity, limited-time offers, social proof), but the AI's pitch style is Western. Using Chinese direct translations feels off, so translate the AI's approach into Chinese sales contexts and localize. Don't copy scripts verbatim.

faq.q: Is it suitable for practicing counter-tactics and spotting sales traps?
faq.a: Very suitable. Have the AI pitch you repeatedly, practice asking about price details, refusing tactics, and demanding written confirmation. After several rounds you develop reflexes against common traps (vague total price, fake discounts, urgency), more effective than reading summary articles.
